alerts.title: ⚠️ LinkedIn Analytics API — 403 ACCESS_DENIED
alerts.meta: Both current-week (2026-03-02→03-09) and prior-week (2026-02-23→03-02) analytics calls failed: 'Unpermitted fields present in PARAMETER: Data Processing Exception while processing fields [/granularity]'. Per-campaign spend, CTR, CPL, leads, and frequency cannot be computed today. Account-level KPIs sourced from read_history. LinkedIn API token scope may need re-authorisation — check Campaign Manager OAuth app permissions.

alerts.title: 🔴 CTR Drop >15% vs 7-Day Average — Account Level
alerts.meta: Account avgCTR fell -18.4% WoW (current: 0.58%). Exceeds HIGH alert threshold of >15%. Cannot isolate to individual campaign without API data — investigate all active campaigns in Campaign Manager.

alerts.title: 🔴 CPL Spike >20% vs 7-Day Average — Account Level
alerts.meta: Account avgCPL rose +24.7% WoW (current: ₹126.10). Exceeds HIGH alert threshold of >20%. Likely correlated with CTR decline. Per-campaign breakdown unavailable until API access is restored.

alerts.title: 🔴 Leads Down -11.8% WoW — Account Level
alerts.meta: Total leads fell from ~38 to 34 week-over-week (-11.8%). Combined with CPL spike and CTR drop, this signals meaningful funnel degradation. Immediate creative refresh and audience review recommended.

opportunities.title: Broadcaster ABM Campaigns — EU & US Expansion Angle
opportunities.meta: Both broadcaster & OTT ABM campaigns are active. With 10.6M video views and 264% Facebook reach increase validated by HockeyOne case study, a proof-point creative refresh could unlock lower CPL for this segment.

opportunities.title: Leagues Campaigns — Multi-Region Proof Point Push
opportunities.meta: Two active league campaigns (US + EU). NSL case study (51.8M video views, 2× Instagram follower growth) and Islamic Solidarity Games (50K+ clips, 7.5M views) provide strong social proof for a refreshed creative test.

opportunities.title: Restore LinkedIn Analytics API Access Immediately
opportunities.meta: Per-campaign analytics are fully dark. Cannot compute CTR, CPL, frequency, or leads per campaign. Re-authorise OAuth scopes (r_ads_reporting) in LinkedIn Campaign Manager → Account Settings → Manage Access.
